commands_run: coord claim core-axiom-apk-receipt "Next carrier lane after PR #3185: inspect/prove APK or Android app packaging surface for the core-axiom native receipt binary/lib; avoid Wi-Fi/non-adb transport, sensor/raw media, BML/compiler, and world-model lanes."
failure_reason: Added a local APK native-library receipt. The proof script generated an Android arm64-v8a shared object, staged it into Coherence Sense jniLibs for a clean debug APK build, verified the APK contains lib/arm64-v8a/libcoherence_core_axiom_receipt.so, and checked the extracted entry SHA matches the generated library SHA. The Form receipt band returns 4095 four-way. JNI load/call and installed-app execution remain next walls.
